name: HOPE BANCORP INC
business: Hope Bancorp Inc. is a bank holding company that offers commercial and retail banking loan and deposit products through its wholly-owned subsidiary, Bank of Hope. It serves a multi-ethnic customer base across the United States with branches in multiple states and a representative office in Seoul, South Korea. Its principal business activities include earning interest on loans and investment securities funded by customer deposits and other borrowings.

exposures.sentence: risk of cybersecurity incidents; and regulatory risks associated with current and future regulations

possible deterioration of economic conditions in our areas of operation and in the US generally, including as a result of the interest rate environment, supply chain disruptions, tariffs and international tensions, inflation, labor shortages, housing and real estate markets
